title: Glurpfish
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Glurpfish''', or '''protoplasmic glurpfish''', were a species of [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Made of [[protoplasm]], the glurpfish had no discernible form, therefore making it sluggish in aspect and movement.

The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Cal]] mechanic [[Terpfen]] kept glurpfish in his private aquarium on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

The [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] kept glurpfish in the swamps and pools of her luxurious if notorious [[Gardulla's pleasure garden|pleasure garden]], within her [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] [[Gardulla the Hutt's Palace/Legends|palace]] near the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]]. They swam around making small popping noises as they burped at the water's surface.

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
